name: meshy-prompt-studio
description: Codex plugin for creating production-ready Meshy prompts and 3D asset workflow guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Create Meshy prompts for production-ready 3D assets.
interface.longDescription: Meshy Prompt Studio helps Codex write focused Meshy prompts and workflow guidance for Text to 3D, Image to 3D, textures, game assets, riggable characters, 3D print models, exports, and troubleshooting.
defaultPrompt: Create a Meshy prompt pack for a riggable game character.
Write Image to 3D and texture prompts for this prop.
Turn this concept into separate game and 3D print prompts.
